title: Interventions to support spirituality among adults with cancer: a scoping review.

assets.abstract: Spirituality is a core component of holistic cancer care, yet additional support is needed to understand and implement spirituality-focused interventions in practice. The aim of this review was to identify available interventions to address spirituality among people with cancer, to explore common components, and to examine efficacy across interventions. A scoping review was conducted. Research questions and criteria were formulated at the outset, followed by identifying relevant publications, ch
